basis: Additive API behavior preserves existing request shapes while adding login identity, profiles, groups, and ACL sharing.
Focused tests cover Access identity, principal actor persistence, group ACL reads, and share-management authorization.
Playwright E2E covers authenticated Console identity/profile behavior and memory management search/detail/refresh behavior.
Docs and env examples describe operational identity constraints and display-only organization metadata.
deductions: Profile and group Console pages are functional but intentionally minimal.
Knowledge doc ownership for pre-existing rows may need an operational backfill.
